LanguageData.LP_Lapin_Bagette.label: Lapin Baguette
LanguageData.LP_Lapin_Bagette.description: A traditional Lapin combat ration. You can eat it, or smash enemies with it.
LanguageData.BaguetteArm.label: Baguette Arm
LanguageData.BaguetteArm.description: This pawn's arm has been replaced with a delicious baguette.
LanguageData.BaguetteLeg.label: Baguette Leg
LanguageData.BaguetteLeg.description: This pawn's leg has been replaced with a baguette.
LanguageData.InstallBaguetteArm.label: Install Baguette Arm
LanguageData.InstallBaguetteLeg.label: Install Baguette Leg
LanguageData.BaguetteArmHit.label: Hit by Baguette Arm
LanguageData.BaguetteArmHit.description: Struck by a delicious baguette arm.
LanguageData.MillLapinWheat.label: Milling Lapin Wheat
LanguageData.MillLapinWheat.description: Ground Wheat grains with a millstone to make flour.
LanguageData.Recipes_Bagette.label: Cooking Lapin Baguette
LanguageData.Recipes_Bagette.description: Bake a crispy baguette with flour and water.
LanguageData.LapinMillstone.label: Lapin Millstone
LanguageData.LapinMillstone.description: It is a small millstone that grinds wheat grains to make fine flour.
LanguageData.RawLapinFlour.label: Lapin Flour
LanguageData.RawLapinWheat.label: Lapin Wheat
LanguageData.RawLapinWheat.description: It is high-quality wheat suitable for making baguettes. It can be ground into flour.
LanguageData.PlantLapinWheat.label: Lapin Wheat
LanguageData.PlantLapinWheat.description: Wheat for making baguettes. It grows quickly and has a decent yield.
LanguageData.LP_Lapin_Bagette_Ate.label: Ate Lapin baguette.
LanguageData.LP_Lapin_Bagette_Ate.description: Eating the Lapin baguette made me feel good.
